Name: EASTMAN ECAG 100 Brushless Angle Grinder 100mm 18V 4.0Ah Battery Kit 800W Cut Off Polisher Variable Speed BMC Box Metalworking
Description: POWERFUL 800W BRUSHLESS MOTOR: Solves the issue of motor burnout and maintenance; the advanced Brushless Technology runs cooler and more efficiently than traditional motors, delivering consistent 800W power to slice through metal pipes, tiles, and concrete with ease. HIGH-CAPACITY 4.0AH BATTERY: Stop worrying about dying batteries mid-job; the included 18V 4.0Ah Lithium-ion battery provides extended runtime and consistent power delivery, allowing you to work freely in remote locations without being tethered to a wall socket. VARIABLE SPEED CONTROL (5000-9000 RPM): Avoid damaging your workpiece; the adjustable speed range allows you to dial down the RPM for delicate sanding and polishing tasks or ramp it up to 9000 RPM for aggressive grinding and cutting applications.
